title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 9}} {{ComicBook |reprint=1 |image=[[File:CSWTEA9-LEC.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 9 |writer=[[Russ Manning]] and [[Rick Hoberg]] |penciller=[[Russ Manning]] and [[Rick Hoberg]] |inker=[[Russ Manning]], [[Dave Stevens]], and [[Alfredo Alcala]] |letterer= |colorist=[[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Kilian Plunkett]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[April 11]], [[1995]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53788/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_9|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #9}} |pages= |upc= |timeline=c. [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5]]–[[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]The "Time Line" of [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] places [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 1]]–[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9|9]] between the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] and the [[Duel on Mimban]] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. |series=''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' |issue=9 |next=last }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 9''' was the ninth issue of the ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' series. This particular ''Classic'' series were reformatted and colored reprints of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|daily newspaper strip]] by [[Russ Manning]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Boba Fett makes his first appearance ever in this issue of Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures! The galaxy's meanest bounty hunter made his debut in the ''Star Wars'' daily newspaper strips reprinted herein, featuring Luke and Han hunted on an icy tundra by the enigmatic masked man, Boba Fett!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures Book 9
THE FROZEN WORLD OF OTA |text=While on patrol near the frozen world of Ota, Luke Skywalker encounters a lone Imperial TIE fighter. After a brief exchange of fire, Luke follows the damaged Imperial ship down to the planet's surface, but Luke is about to find out that this is no ordinary Imperial fighter pilot...}} ==Contents== *"[[The Frozen World of Ota]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9}} ===Cover gallery=== File:CSWEarlyAdventures9.jpg|Dark Horse cover File:CSWTEA9-LEC.png|Legends Epic Collection cover File:ClassicStarWarsEarlyAdventures9CC.jpg|Alternately colored cover ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|1|Boba Fett: Mystery Man in Not-So-Shining Armor}} *''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53788/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_9|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #9}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ადრეული თავგადასავლები 9 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures issues|09|Early Adventures 09]]
